title: Ikea Soft Toys
description: CIT pack which change carved pumpkin into some IKEA plushies
body:
**This pack works perfectly with Optifine or any cit mod (ex: Cit Resewn (haven't tested))**

--------------------------------------------------

ikea map: https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ikea-2-0/

CIT pack which change carved pumpkin into some IKEA plushies

+ Rename carved pumpkin into one of the name listed on the 4th image.
+ Place Plushies on Item Frame to display
+ Plushies can be worn on head similar to carved pumpkin (removed the effect)
+ :)

Thanks for downloading/visiting. 
Any suggestions will be greatly appreciated!. Feel free to comment any errors/mistakes
You may use this pack in a video etc just credit me okay:)

--------------------------------------------------
